prompt_latex: $y$ varies inversely with $x$. If $x=5$ gives $y=7$, what value of $x$ gives $y=5$?
solution_latex: The constant product is $5\cdot 7=35$. Since $5x=35$, we get $x=7$.

prompt_latex: Rectangles have fixed area $48$. One rectangle has width $6$ and length $8$. What is the length when the width is $8$?
solution_latex: For fixed area, length and width are inversely proportional. The length is $48/8=6$.

prompt_latex: $4$ workers working $5$ hours per day finish a job in $72$ days. How many days will $6$ workers working $4$ hours per day need?
solution_latex: Total worker-hours are constant. They are $4\cdot 5\cdot 72=1440$, so the new days are $1440/(6\cdot 4)=60$.

prompt_latex: $5$ workers working $6$ hours per day finish a job in $140$ days. How many days will $7$ workers working $5$ hours per day need?
solution_latex: Total worker-hours are constant. They are $5\cdot 6\cdot 140=4200$, so the new days are $4200/(7\cdot 5)=120$.

prompt_latex: $y$ is inversely proportional to $x$. If $y=15$ at $x=6$, what is $y$ when $x$ is tripled?
solution_latex: Tripling $x$ divides $y$ by $3$, so the new value is $15/3=5$.
